activities_projects.title: Resource Distribution Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how uneven distribution of resources affects development
steps: Select two states of India with different resource availability
List the major natural resources found in each state
Compare their economic development indicators such as industries or GDP contribution
Write a short report explaining the relationship between resources and development
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical skills in studying geographical resource distribution
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of comparison and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sustainable Development Case Study
steps: Choose a real-world example of sustainable development in India
Explain the resources involved and how they are managed
Identify environmental, economic, and social benefits
Suggest improvements for better sustainability
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of balancing development and environmental protection
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and evaluation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Land Use Change Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study how land use patterns change over time
steps: Collect information about land use in your region over the last 10–20 years
Identify changes such as urban expansion or reduction in agricultural land
Analyze the reasons behind these changes
Discuss possible environmental impacts
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to analyze temporal changes in land use patterns

activities_projects.title: Soil Type and Crop Suitability Study
activities_projects.objective: Examine the relationship between soil type and crop production
steps: Select two major soil types in India
Identify crops commonly grown in these soils
Explain why these soils are suitable for those crops
Suggest improvements in soil management
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect soil properties with agricultural productivity

activities_projects.title: Land Degradation Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Investigate causes and distribution of land degradation
steps: Mark regions in India affected by land degradation
Label the main causes such as mining, overgrazing, deforestation, or over-irrigation
Prepare a short explanation for each cause
Suggest preventive measures
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand spatial distribution of environmental problems
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of mapping and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Soil Conservation Field Study
activities_projects.objective: Observe soil conservation methods in practice
steps: Visit a nearby agricultural field or hilly area
Identify soil conservation techniques used such as terrace farming or contour ploughing
Interview a farmer or local resident about the method used
Write a field report with observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain practical exposure to soil conservation methods

activities_projects.title: Impact of Resource Exploitation Debate
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking about resource exploitation
steps: Divide students into two groups
One group supports rapid industrial use of resources
The other group supports strict conservation
Conduct a debate and summarize key arguments
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand conflicting perspectives on resource utilization

activities_projects.title: Rio Earth Summit Research
steps: Research the Rio Earth Summit of 1992
Explain its goals and major declarations
Discuss the concept of Agenda 21
Explain how these initiatives influence sustainable development today

activities_projects.title: Resource Planning Model
activities_projects.objective: Design a simplified model of resource planning
steps: Create a flowchart showing stages of resource planning
Include resource identification, planning structure, and implementation
Add examples from India
Present the model to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand systematic planning for resource management

activities_projects.title: Future Resource Scenario Essay
steps: Imagine the world in 2050 with increasing population
Discuss potential resource shortages
Suggest technological or policy solutions
Write a structured essay presenting your ideas
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop forward-thinking and problem-solving skills
